author: binokyo
title: Stops every two songs!
content: I want an app like this. User friendly and has the touch same to apple music and spotify. Have been a spotify user for years. I will not say its perfect because it also has a share of minor glitches like for example downloaded songs for for download again. But they update the app regularly. Using your app, i did not renew for a spotify premium because i have full trust in your app if to have to base it on the reviews. But here’s what made me annoyed.. every two songs played inside a playlist it stopped as if the whole playlist has been played. Why is it so? I have checked all the shuffle and the repeat button and tried all but still the same problem. I have also turned off all wifi connections and still the same. What remedy can i do? Or what action can you do on your part for me to stay with you. Im hoping for the betterment of your app. Thank you.

author: JCandava
title: Wonderful app!!!
content:
I have never bought any app ever since I started using my first IOS device. Only this time. I am very satisfied with my purchase and I enjoy using this app very much. Those who have not used cloud storage and do not have the idea about the convenience of accessing files through the network, especially streaming music & movies, will never appreciate this program. But as for me I think 5 stars are not enough to describe my pleasure. 

I suggest that you include Apple Music queuing method (Play Next, Add to Up Next, & Add to a Playlist) if you can. Also I hope I can edit Account's credentials anytime and not re-typing everything  whenever I change network IP (like Document app). Likewise I think the position of an Airplay button should be placed rightmost. I frequently hit it accidentally whenever I try to adjust the volume slider from full to lower. 

Thank you and more power.
